name: Bromfenac Ophthalmic Eye Drop
about: Bromfenac Ophthalmic Eye Drop is a liquid-based medication recommended for eye-related problems. The dosage of the medicine should be as per the suggestion of a physician. The drop is formulated to provide relief from pain, swelling, and inflammation caused by eye surgery or any eye-related issue. It is stored in a dry place to maintain its efficacy. The product is safely packed and has a long shelf life. The medicine is not recommended for children and pregnant women without consulting a physician.

faq.a: Bromfenac Ophthalmic Eye Drop is a liquid-based medication recommended for eye-related problems. It provides relief from pain, swelling, and inflammation caused by eye surgery or any eye-related issue.

faq.a: The dosage of the medicine should be as per the suggestion of a physician.

faq.q: How should I store Bromfenac Ophthalmic Eye Drop?
faq.a: The medicine should be stored in a dry place to maintain its efficacy.

faq.q: Is Bromfenac Ophthalmic Eye Drop safe for children and pregnant women?
faq.a: The medicine is not recommended for children and pregnant women without consulting a physician.

faq.q: What is the form of Bromfenac Ophthalmic Eye Drop?
faq.a: Bromfenac Ophthalmic Eye Drop is a liquid-based medication.
